violations.text: Raw animal foods such as liquid eggs and raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as carrots in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer was properly adjusted manually during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of the icemachine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. quaternary ammonium dispenser in kitchen 2. dipper well in cafe space 3. air curtain in exterior walk-in 4. exterior walk-in cooler door (not tight fitting) New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The floors in the production kitchen were observed in poor repair in several areas (coating observed cracked and/or chipped). The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
